description: Implement a strict SSH user whitelist using Wazuh's CDB list feature. Create a CDB list file at /var/ossec/etc/lists/authorized_users containing the user 'ga' and register it in the Wazuh manager configuration (ossec.conf). Configure a custom rule in local_rules.xml with ID 100500 as a child of rule 5715. The rule must trigger a level 12 alert with the description "Unauthorized SSH user login detected" when an authenticated SSH user is not found in the authorized_users list. Apply all changes and verify the logic using the sample logs provided in /home/ga/ssh_test_logs.txt.
